TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Willie_Anderson, title = Willie_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Willie_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Willie Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 1, Willie Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Willie Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 1, Willie Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: willie an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, willie an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
